question.label: Late changes
question.name: When direction changes late, what usually got missed from your side?
question.description: Drills into the specific thread he named to surface the concrete failure point behind the frustration.

answer: I am still unsure what good really looks like here week to week.

assessment.note: He names a clear lack of week-to-week success criteria, which reads as strong disengagement risk on the axis this question tested; also reveals an unscored clarity gap worth addressing next.

new_queue.label: Good looks like
new_queue.name: When you say 'what good looks like' — what's most unclear right now?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change the week for you?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
I am still unsure what good really looks like here week to week.
